member.name: M:CitiesManager.web.Controllers.CitiesController.GetCities
member.summary: Retrieves all cities from the data store.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an with a collection of objects representing all available cities.

member.name: M:CitiesManager.web.Controllers.CitiesController.GetCity(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves the city with the specified unique identifier.
member.param: The unique identifier of the city to retrieve.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an representing the city with the specified identifier if found; otherwise, a problem response indicating that the city was not found.

member.name: M:CitiesManager.web.Controllers.CitiesController.PutCity(System.Guid,CitiesManager.web.Models.City)
member.summary: Updates the details of an existing city with the specified identifier.
member.remarks: If the specified city does not exist, the method returns a 404 Not Found response. If the does not match the CityId of the provided , the method returns a 400 Bad Request response. Concurrency conflicts during the update will result in an exception unless the city no longer exists.
member.param: The unique identifier of the city to update.
The updated city data. The property must match the parameter.
member.returns: An indicating the result of the operation. Returns if the update is successful; if the city does not exist; or if the identifiers do not match.

member.name: M:CitiesManager.web.Controllers.CitiesController.PostCity(CitiesManager.web.Models.City)
member.summary: Creates a new city and adds it to the data store.
member.remarks: If the operation is successful, the response has HTTP status code 201 (Created) and includes the created city in the response body. The location header points to the endpoint for retrieving the newly created city.
member.param: The city entity to add. Must not be null.
member.returns: An containing the created city and a location header with a URI to retrieve the city by its identifier.

member.name: M:CitiesManager.web.Controllers.CitiesController.DeleteCity(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes the city with the specified unique identifier.
member.param: The unique identifier of the city to delete.
member.returns: An that represents the result of the delete operation. Returns if the city does not exist; otherwise, returns on successful deletion.

member.name: M:CitiesManager.web.Controllers.TestController.Index
member.summary: Handles HTTP GET requests and returns a simple greeting message.
member.returns: A string containing the greeting message "Hello World!".

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
